title: bromus hordeaceus subsp. mediterraneus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus subsp. mediterraneus, also known as Mediterranean brome, is a subspecies of the Brome grass, a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Bromus hordeaceus subsp. mediterraneus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be applied directly to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
